## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**PAY_AUDIT** -> CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUST_NO -> CUSTOMER); OE_MULTI_SHIP (SHIPTO -> SHIP_SEQ); ORDER_HEADER (ORDER_NO -> ORDER_NO)

**PAY_AUDIT_2** -> CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUST_NO -> CUSTOMER); ORDER_HEADER (SHIPMENT_ORDER -> ORDER_NO); SHIPMENT_HEADER (SHIPMENT_SEQ -> ORDER_SUFFIX)

**PAY_AUDIT_3** -> CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUST_NO -> CUSTOMER); ORDER_HEADER (CC_ORDER_NO -> ORDER_NO); ORDER_HIST_HEAD (CC_INVOICE_NO -> INVOICE); SHIPMENT_HEADER (CC_SEQ_NO -> ORDER_SUFFIX)

**PAY_HIST_ACCRU** -> EMPLOYEE_MSTR (EMPLOYEE -> EMPLOYEE)

**PAY_HIST_DED** -> DEPARTMENTS (EMP_DEPARTMENT -> DEPT_ID); EMPLOYEE_MSTR (EMPLOYEE -> EMPLOYEE); PAYROLL_OTHER_MAIN (LOCAL_1_CODE->OTHER_CODE, LOCAL_2_CODE->OTHER_CODE); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**PAY_HIST_EARN** -> DEPARTMENTS (DEPT_1->DEPT_ID, DEPT_2->DEPT_ID, DEPT_3->DEPT_ID); EMPLOYEE_MSTR (EMPLOYEE -> EMPLOYEE); PAYROLL_PAY_CATS (EARNINGS -> PAY_CATEGORY); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**PAY_HIST_EMPLOYER** -> EMPLOYEE_MSTR (EMPLOYEE -> EMPLOYEE); PAYROLL_PAY_CATS (EARNINGS -> PAY_CATEGORY); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)

**PAY_W2_ADDL** -> EMPLOYEE_MSTR (EMPLOYEE -> EMPLOYEE); USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER)
